pageContext.name: Tiferet: Emanation of Beauty
pageContext.description: Sideshow presents the Tiferet: Emanation of Beauty Fine Art Print, an exquisite and otherworldly original fantasy artwork by Peter Mohrbacher. Part of his original Angelarium series, this contemplative composition honors the sixth Emanation of the Tree of Life, Tiferet.  From the mind of Peter Mohrbacher, the Angelarium project has grown into an artistic anthology of designs inspired by numerous named angels throughout mythology. The Tiferet: Emanation of Beauty Fine Art Print illustrates this angel drenched in warmth and existing in perfect harmony amid a storm of energy. His graceful form is poised in his rumination, rigid yet fluid, representative of the many aspects for which he is known. In his hands he holds a yellow orb to help guide the other Emanations. In this way, Tiferet exists as the equilibrium of the entire Tree of Life.  This resolute portrait is now being offered to fans in a high-end, museum quality print format for the first time in collaboration with Sideshow Art Prints. Each Tiferet: Emanation of Beauty Fine Art Print features an authorized, automated artist signature and an embossed Angelarium logo in the margin as part of the limited edition of 250 pieces. Available as an unframed giclée and in a custom framed presentation, this divine fantasy artwork makes a truly unique addition to any collection, especially alongside other Angelarium art prints.  Bring balance to your life with the Tiferet: Emanation of Beauty Fine Art Print by Peter Mohrbacher today.
